text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka achieves a remarkable victory at
the Kinko Sho. Afterwards, Air Groove tells her
that she has become an ideal for other
Umamusume to aspire to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Staking her pride as Empress, Air Groove declares
she'll supersede that ideal one day and challenges
Silence Suzuka to a race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Air Groove and Silence Suzuka decide
the ultimate competition between the two of
them will take place at the Takarazuka Kinen.
